name: budoux
notes: Bundled ESM with all CJK + Thai models. Byte-identical mirror of the /+esm response (sourceMappingURL line preserved; dereferencing it from this origin yields a harmless 404). SHA-256 matches jsDelivr's own hash convention for static package files (see https://data.jsdelivr.com/v1/packages/npm/budoux@0.8.1?structure=flat).
